title: What's Your Habit Style?

results.title: Routine Builder
results.description: You thrive on structure and consistency. Habits feel natural when they're woven into your daily fabric, and you maintain them by keeping them on autopilot. Your strength is reliability; your challenge is flexibility when life disrupts your rhythm. Embrace routines but also build in small windows of grace for inevitable change.

results.title: Streak Chaser
results.description: You're motivated by progress and visible wins. Streaks, counts, and the fear of breaking them keep you accountable and moving forward. You excel at momentum-building but may occasionally sacrifice rest or adaptation for the sake of the streak. Give yourself permission to reset without shame when needed.

results.title: Freewheeler
results.description: You prefer flexibility and intuition over rigid commitment. You're adaptive and spontaneous, which helps you avoid burnout, but consistency can feel constraining. Your success comes from making habits optional and enjoyable rather than mandatory. Try low-pressure, interest-based approaches instead of willpower-heavy ones.

options.text: Same routine every day—same time, same steps
I have a routine but occasionally shake it up
Depends on how I feel that day

questions.question: How do you typically start your morning?
How important is it for you to maintain a visible streak of consecutive days doing something?
Do you feel stressed or anxious when you break a habit or skip a day?

options.text: Very little derails me once I commit
Travel, schedule changes, or unexpected events

questions.question: What's most likely to derail your consistency?
How much do you plan or structure your habits in advance?

options.text: Build it into my daily routine so it's automatic
Track progress visually and celebrate milestones
Keep it loose and do it when it feels right
I rarely try to build habits deliberately

questions.question: Your ideal way to build a habit is:
What habit have you successfully maintained for the longest, and what made it stick?

description: Discover whether you're a Routine Builder, Streak Chaser, or Freewheeler. Learn how you naturally approach consistency and what drives your habit formation.
